Description: Sitemap must be well-formed valid XML
Maximum 50000 URLs per sitemap file
HTTP 200 status code for all URLs
lastmod dates are actual not all identical
priority and changefreq tags ignored by Google
Sitemap referenced in robots.txt file
Proper sitemapindex format for >50k URLs
Homepage URL included with priority 1.0
Main category pages with priority 0.8
Service and product pages with priority 0.7
Blog posts and content with priority 0.6
Location pages for local business priority 0.7
Split sitemaps by type pages posts images
Each URL appears only once in sitemap
Strip query parameters from URLs
Use canonical version not variants
All URLs use HTTPS not HTTP
Do not include URLs that redirect
Never include noindexed pages
Limit to 50MB per file uncompressed
Compress large sitemaps with gzip
Separate image sitemap for image URLs
Video sitemap for video content
News sitemap for publisher sites
Mobile sitemap if different mobile URLs
Warning at 30+ location pages flag thin content
Hard stop at 50+ location pages require justification
75%+ unique content between generated pages
Minimum word count enforcement per page type
Avoid pure directory pages without unique content
Spread topics across pages prevent competing
Proper links between generated pages hierarchy
Landing pages real unique setup documentation
Template tool pages downloadable content
Glossary pages 200+ word definitions
Product pages unique specs reviews ratings
User profile pages with user-generated content
Location pages only city name swapped high risk
Comparison pages without real data high risk
Alternative pages without genuine comparison risky
AI-generated pages without human review risky
